mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chunk_bge_m3 (kb_id, doc_id, content, metadata, embedding, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (CAST(#{kbId} AS uuid), CAST(#{docId} AS uuid), #{content}, #{metadata}, #{embedding}::vector, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, kb_id, doc_id, content, metadata, embedding, created_at, updated_at FROM chunk_bge_m3 WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM chunk_bge_m3 WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.update:
UPDATE chunk_bge_m3
kb_id = CAST(#{kbId} AS uuid),
doc_id = CAST(#{docId} AS uuid),
content = #{content},
metadata = #{metadata},
embedding = #{embedding}::vector,
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.kb_id, c.doc_id, d.filename AS doc_name, c.content, c.metadata::text AS metadata, c.embedding, (c.embedding <-> #{vectorLiteral}::vector) AS distance, c.created_at, c.updated_at FROM chunk_bge_m3 c LEFT JOIN document d ON d.id = c.doc_id WHERE c.kb_id = CAST(#{kbId} AS uuid) ORDER BY c.embedding <-> #{vectorLiteral}::vector LIMIT #{limit}

WITH scored AS ( SELECT c.id, c.kb_id, c.doc_id, d.filename AS doc_name, c.content, c.metadata::text AS metadata, c.embedding, ts_rank_cd( to_tsvector('simple', COALESCE(c.content, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(c.metadata::text, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(d.filename, '')), plainto_tsquery('simple', #{query}) ) AS keyword_rank, c.created_at, c.updated_at FROM chunk_bge_m3 c LEFT JOIN document d ON d.id = c.doc_id WHERE c.kb_id = CAST(#{kbId} AS uuid) ) SELECT id, kb_id, doc_id, doc_name, content, metadata, embedding, CASE WHEN keyword_rank > 0 THEN 1.0 / (1.0 + keyword_rank) ELSE 0.98 END AS distance, created_at, updated_at FROM scored WHERE keyword_rank > 0
OR
LOWER(content) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(COALESCE(metadata, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(COALESCE(doc_name, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%')
ORDER BY keyword_rank DESC, updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
